visual_findings: The fresh in-process worker run produced SLDDRW/PDF/DXF/PNG artifacts and structural API gates are green, but the Drawing Review UI screenshot remains visually unacceptable.
The generated drawing places a dense angled dimension/callout stack over the left/top area of the drawing; this does not match the concise same-name reference layout.
The right-side small feature/projection area is not annotated in the compact reference style, and the generated dimension distribution remains AutoDimension-like rather than drafter-intent grouped.
The title block and bottom information area differ visibly from the reference drawing; API/style scores are supporting evidence only and do not override this screenshot judgement.
cases.required_next_action: Recreate the 006 hole/radius/thread and small-feature dimension groups explicitly in the reference-style right-side leader area, reduce the tilted dimension stack, then rerun 006 and repeat Drawing Review UI screenshot judgement.

acceptance_rule: A drawing is not accepted until the application Drawing Review UI screenshot is visually judged PASS against the same-name reference drawing.
